personal.name: Veena K
personal.title: Python Full Stack Developer | Design Thinking Intern
personal.tagline: Passionate about building user-focused applications and solving real-world problems through technology.
personal.bio: I am an aspiring Python full stack developer with a strong interest in building responsive web applications and solving real-world problems. Alongside my technical journey, I have gained practical exposure to design thinking and project management during my internship. I enjoy learning new technologies, improving my problem-solving skills, and creating user-friendly solutions.
personal.currentRoleDescription: Learning and applying design thinking principles to solve real-world problems. Gaining hands-on experience in project management, user research, ideation, and prototyping.

about.title: About
sections: I am a motivated and curious learner currently focusing on Python full stack development. I have a good understanding of front-end and back-end technologies and enjoy building projects that are both functional and user-friendly.

During my design thinking internship, I explored problem-solving approaches, user-centric design, and project management concepts, which helped me think beyond coding and understand real-world applications.
I am continuously working on improving my skills in web development and aiming to build impactful projects that solve meaningful problems.

experience.title: Design Thinking Intern
experience.description: Worked on understanding design thinking concepts including empathy, ideation, prototyping, and testing. Applied project management techniques and collaborated on problem-solving tasks.

projects.title: Personal Portfolio Website
projects.description: Designed and developed a personal portfolio website.
projects.longDescription: Built a personal portfolio using modern web technologies to showcase my skills and projects. Focused on clean UI design and responsiveness.

projects.title: Form Handling Project
projects.description: Created a form with proper data handling.
projects.longDescription: Developed a web form with validation and data handling features. Learned how to manage user input and display results effectively.
